selfConnectionWarn: Self-connections create loops — allowed, but bounded by turn limits.
emptyText: Add an agent and wire edges, or try a sample playground to see how multi-agent workflows work across domains like product, science, and law.

moderator.label: Moderator
moderator.hint: Facilitates the discussion; scheduled by edges but always sees the full transcript.

summarizer.label: Summarizer
summarizer.hint: Runs automatically in the wrap-up phase, after the discussion ends.

finalizer.label: Finalizer
finalizer.hint: Runs last, in the wrap-up phase — after every other agent.
